tours.title: Saki Tours & Weddings
tours.description: Field trip operations for wedding hires, airport transfers, and tours.

hhco.title: HHCO Helmet Delivery
hhco.description: Daily helmet delivery operations for HHCO.

operationsTools.title: Operations tools
operationsTools.description: Leave, fleet, employee records, office overview, and reports on this device.

pwa.installDescription: Add the app to your home screen for faster access.
pwa.updateDescription: Version {{version}} is ready. Reload when convenient.

language.title: Choose your language
language.description: You can change this later in settings.

errors.notFoundDescription: The page you requested does not exist or has moved.
errors.offlineDescription: Check your connection, then try again. Offline sync arrives in a later phase.
errors.maintenanceDescription: Saki Operations is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
errors.genericDescription: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

placeholder.description: This section of the app is reserved for a future release.

ready.footnote: Language and theme are available from the top bar. More personal tools arrive in a later phase.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Operational alerts will land here when workforce messaging is enabled.
notifications.body: You're all caught up. Trip and delivery alerts will appear in this inbox once that channel is switched on.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Your signed-in workforce identity on this device.
profile.name: Display name
profile.body: Sign in to view your workforce profile.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Core preferences stay in the top bar for quick access while you work.
settings.body: Use the language control in the top bar for now. Expanded settings arrive with later operations phases.

settingsAbout.title: Settings
settingsAbout.description: Application identity, build details, and live service status.
settingsAbout.systemDescription: Device and browser diagnostics for support.

home.title: Saki Tours Operations
home.description: Start or continue a field operation. Complete the active session before starting another.
home.startNewHint: Select vehicle, hire type, capture odometer and start time.
home.viewPreviousHint: Browse completed operations on this device.

active.blockedDescription: You already have an operation in progress. Please complete it before starting another operation.

continue.title: Continue Operation
continue.description: Review this session, then end the operation when the hire is finished.
continue.notActive: This session is not an active operation on this device.

gps.title: GPS Tracking
gps.poorAccuracy: GPS accuracy is poor. Move to an open area if possible.
gps.lowBattery: Battery is below 15%. Connect a charger if possible.

history.title: Previous Operations
history.description: Read-only history of completed Tours operations stored on this device.
history.searchPlaceholder: Search by vehicle or hire type
history.emptyDescription: Completed operations will appear here. Queued and synced sessions stay available offline.

detail.readOnly: This record is read-only and cannot be edited.
detail.missingDescription: This completed operation is not available on this device.

photos.title: Photo evidence
photos.readOnly: Tap a photo to view full screen. Read only.

history.filterEmptyDescription: Try clearing search or filters to see more operations.

wizard.title: Start Operation
wizard.stepVehicle: Select the vehicle for this hire.
wizard.startFailed: Could not start the operation. Your photos are still on this device — try again.
wizard.missingUser: Sign in again to start an operation.
wizard.missingDriver: Select a driver before starting the operation.

company.title: Select company
company.description: Choose the company this operation belongs to.

vehicle.title: Select vehicle
vehicle.label: Vehicle
vehicle.description: Choose the vehicle for this operation.
vehicle.serviceNote: This vehicle is in service and cannot start an operation.

vehicleBlocked.title: This vehicle already has an active operation.

driver.title: Select driver
driver.description: Choose the driver assigned to this operation.
driver.label: Driver

assistants.title: Select assistants
assistants.description: Choose any assistants travelling with the driver. This step can be skipped.
assistants.label: Assistants
assistants.selectorDescription: Select one or more available assistants.

destination.title: Enter destination
destination.description: Enter the main destination for this operation.
destination.label: Destination

hireType.title: Hire type
hireType.description: Pick the operation category. No booking or customer details are needed.
hireType.tourHint: Day tour or multi-day tour hire.

odometer.title: Start odometer
odometer.description: Take a photo of the dashboard. OCR suggests a reading — you always confirm the final kilometres. Manual entry keeps the photo.
odometer.lowConfidence: Confidence is below 95%. Verify against the photo and enter the correct value if needed.
odometer.failed: Could not read the odometer reliably. Enter the value manually — your photo stays attached.
odometer.warningBelowPrevious: This reading is lower than the previous odometer. Confirm only if correct.
odometer.warningLargeJump: This is an unusually large increase. Confirm only if the reading is correct.
odometer.warningTooShort: Enter a complete odometer reading (at least 4 digits).
odometer.acknowledgeWarning: I have checked the photo and confirm this reading

startTime.title: Start time
startTime.description: Take a photo. The device clock is recorded automatically.
startTime.readOnlyHint: Drivers cannot edit start time. Office correction comes later.
startTime.captureFailed: Could not capture the photo. Try again.

startKm.title: Enter start KM
startKm.description: Confirm the final start odometer reading before review.
startKm.changeHint: To change this reading, go back and retake or edit the odometer photo.

confirm.title: Ready to start
confirm.description: Starting creates an offline session on this device immediately.
confirm.offlineNote: Works offline — the session is saved locally and syncs when online.
confirm.autoTimeNote: Works offline. The device time is recorded automatically when you start.

success.title: Operation Started Successfully
success.description: Your session is live and stored on this device.
success.missingDescription: This operation session is not available on this device.

endOdometer.title: End odometer
endOdometer.description: Take a photo of the dashboard. OCR suggests a reading — you always confirm the final kilometres. Manual entry keeps the photo.
endOdometer.lowConfidence: Confidence is below 95%. Verify against the photo and enter the correct value if needed.
endOdometer.failed: Could not read the odometer reliably. Enter the value manually — your photo stays attached.
endOdometer.warningBelowPrevious: This reading is lower than the previous odometer. Confirm only if correct.
endOdometer.warningLargeJump: This is an unusually large increase. Confirm only if the reading is correct.
endOdometer.warningTooShort: Enter a complete odometer reading (at least 4 digits).
endOdometer.acknowledgeWarning: I have checked the photo and confirm this reading

endTime.title: End work time
endTime.description: Take a photo. The device clock is recorded automatically.
endTime.readOnlyHint: Drivers cannot edit end time. Office correction comes later.
endTime.captureFailed: Could not capture the photo. Try again.

endKm.title: Enter end KM
endKm.description: Confirm the final end odometer reading before review.
endKm.changeHint: To change this reading, go back and retake or edit the odometer photo.

endTotals.title: Totals
endTotals.description: Working hours and total KM are calculated from start and end captures.
endTotals.calcFailed: Could not calculate totals. Check that end time is after start and end odometer is not lower than start.

endReview.title: Review
endReview.description: Confirm details before finishing this operation.
endReview.finishDescription: Finish to close this operation. Device date and time are recorded automatically.
endReview.offlineNote: You are offline — the completed session will wait to synchronize.
endReview.onlineNote: You are online — finishing prepares immediate synchronization.
endReview.autoTimeNote: Works offline. The device date and time are recorded automatically when you finish.

endWizard.title: Finish Operation
endWizard.finishFailed: Could not finish the operation. Your photos are still on this device — try again.
endWizard.notActive: This session cannot be ended. It may already be completed.

completed.title: Operation Completed Successfully
completed.description: This session is closed and stored on this device.
completed.missingDescription: This completed session is not available on this device.

multiDay.continueDescription: Complete today's tasks for this multi-day operation. One session spans all days.
multiDay.noPendingTask: No pending capture for today. Return to the operation overview.
multiDay.captureFailed: Could not save today's capture. Your photo is still on this device — try again.
multiDay.finishFailed: Could not finish the multi-day operation. Try again.

captureHint.start_work_time: Take a photo. Device time is recorded automatically.
captureHint.end_work_time: Take a photo to close out today's work.
captureHint.end_odometer: Capture the end odometer, then finish this multi-day operation.
captureHint.finish: Confirm totals and finish the operation.
captureHint.start_odometer: Start odometer was captured when the operation began.

errors.required: Please fill in all required fields.
errors.generic: Unable to complete authentication. Please try again.
errors.passwordLength: Password must be at least {{min}} characters.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.fieldStaffNoLogin: Field staff do not sign in. Use Start Operation from the home screen.

login.title: Admin Login
login.subtitle: Sign in with your office or admin account.

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.subtitle: We will send reset instructions if an account exists.
forgot.success: If an account exists, reset instructions were sent.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.subtitle: Choose a new secure password.
reset.success: Your password was reset. Please sign in.

change.title: Change password
change.subtitle: Update your password to keep your account secure.
change.success: Password updated. Please sign in again.

dealer.description: Select the dealer for this helmet delivery. No booking or customer details are needed.

apply.title: Apply for leave
apply.description: Submit a request. Office or admin can approve it from the detail screen.

errors.datesRequired: Start and end dates are required.
errors.invalidRange: End date must be on or after the start date.

detail.title: Leave request

list.description: Filter drivers and office staff. Profiles are stored on this device.

officeDash.description: Live field operations overview from data stored on this device.

home.description: Build daily and monthly summaries from offline operations sessions on this device.
home.periodHint: On each report you can switch daily or monthly period, then export PDF or Excel (CSV).
